Class Game

java.lang.Object
Model.Game
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class Game extends Object implements Serializable, Cloneable
Represents a game session of Galaxy Trucker. Manages players, the tile pool, the flight board, and overall game state.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(MatchLevel level)
      Constructs a new Game instance based only on the match level. Automatically loads components and adventure cards.
      Parameters:
      level - match difficulty level

    • Game

    • renderCard

    • visualizeRewards

      public void visualizeRewards()
      Displays a formatted table showing all players ordered by their credit count. This method provides a clear leaderboard view for the TUI during the rewards phase, displaying players from highest to lowest credit count. This helps players understand the final standings and rewards distribution at the end of the game.

    • getRankIndicator

      private String getRankIndicator(int rank)
      Returns a rank indicator string with special symbols for top positions. Provides visual distinction for podium positions in the leaderboard.
      Parameters:
      rank - the player's rank position (1-based)
      Returns:
      formatted rank string with appropriate symbol

    • setErrorMessage

      public void setErrorMessage(String errorMessage)

      public String getErrorMessage()
